diagram_title: C Root Daemon Splice Proxy Hardening — IDEF0

activities.title: Accept and Buffer HTTP Request
activities.description: Non-blocking accept, per-connection read buffer, accumulate until complete HTTP header.

decomposition.title: Accept Connection
decomposition.description: accept4() with SOCK_CLOEXEC, set non-blocking, allocate PendingRequest, register to epoll.

decomposition.title: Accumulate HTTP Data
decomposition.description: On EPOLLIN for pending fd, read available bytes into per-connection buffer until \r\n\r\n detected.

decomposition.title: Enforce Request Limits
decomposition.description: Reject oversized (>8KB header) or timed-out (>30s) requests with 400/408 response.

activities.title: Authenticate User
activities.description: PAM auth in dedicated thread, JWT signing, login rate limiting.

decomposition.title: Check Rate Limit
decomposition.description: Per-IP sliding window: >5 failures in 60s → 429 without entering PAM.

decomposition.title: Spawn Auth Thread
decomposition.description: pthread for PAM authenticate + pam_acct_mgmt. Communicates result via eventfd/pipe.

decomposition.title: Issue JWT Cookie
decomposition.description: On PAM success, sign JWT with file-backed secret (sub + exp), set HttpOnly cookie.

activities.title: Validate Identity and Route
activities.description: Decode JWT claims, verify sub + exp, resolve target daemon by identity.

decomposition.title: Decode and Verify JWT
decomposition.description: Base64url decode payload, validate sub + exp, HMAC signature check with file-backed secret.

decomposition.title: Resolve User Identity
decomposition.description: sub → getpwnam() → uid. Reject if user not found.

decomposition.title: Select Target Daemon
decomposition.description: find_or_create_daemon(username) → registry lookup by uid → adopt or spawn.

activities.title: Manage Daemon Lifecycle
activities.description: Discovery-first adopt, fork+setuid spawn, readiness wait, stale cleanup.

decomposition.title: Try Adopt from Discovery
decomposition.description: Read daemon.json, verify PID alive, probe socket connectable. Adopt or cleanup stale state.

decomposition.title: Spawn Per-User Daemon
decomposition.description: fork → initgroups → setgid → setuid → execvp(opencode serve --unix-socket). No sh -c.

decomposition.title: Wait for Readiness
decomposition.description: Poll socket existence + connectability within timeout. Handle child exit before readiness.

decomposition.title: Detect Runtime Path
decomposition.description: Check /run/user/<uid>/ → $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR → /tmp/opencode-<uid>/. Log selected path.

activities.title: Establish and Run Splice Proxy
activities.description: Connect to daemon Unix socket, create pipe pairs, register to epoll with tagged context, splice bidirectionally.

decomposition.title: Connect and Allocate
decomposition.description: connect_unix(socket_path), alloc Connection slot, create pipe pairs, set non-blocking.

decomposition.title: Register with Tagged Context
decomposition.description: Create EpollCtx for client_fd (SPLICE_CLIENT) and daemon_fd (SPLICE_DAEMON), register to epoll.

decomposition.title: Forward Initial Request
decomposition.description: Send buffered HTTP request bytes to daemon_fd.

decomposition.title: Run Directional Splice
decomposition.description: On EPOLLIN: check EpollCtx.type → splice only in triggered direction. On HUP/ERR: close.

activities.title: Manage Connection Lifecycle
activities.description: Proper cleanup: EPOLL_CTL_DEL, close fds, release slot, decrement counter, guard in-flight events.

decomposition.title: Deregister from epoll
decomposition.description: EPOLL_CTL_DEL for both client_fd and daemon_fd before closing.

decomposition.title: Close and Release
decomposition.description: Close all fds (client, daemon, pipe pairs), release connection slot, decrement g_nconns.

decomposition.title: Guard In-Flight Events
decomposition.description: Set closed flag on Connection. Same-round epoll events check flag and skip if set.

arrows.label: Complete HTTP Request with JWT Cookie
PAM Service and JWT Secret File
